style.pattern: hero + intro + 3 feature rows + details grid + CTA footer

build_pages.name: Audi Q5 Sportback
build_pages.hero_sub: Coupe-inspired silhouette. Everyday utility. quattro® standard.
build_pages.intro: The Audi Q5 Sportback blends sculpted SUV proportions with a sleeker roofline—delivering the utility of a Q5 with a more dynamic stance.

features.label: Design
features.title: Sportback silhouette
features.body: A sloping rear roofline gives the Q5 Sportback a coupe-inspired profile while keeping cargo versatility.

features.label: Technology
features.title: Dual digital displays
features.body: A modern cockpit keeps navigation, media, and vehicle info in clear view.

features.label: Performance
features.title: quattro® all-wheel drive
features.body: Confident traction and everyday performance, with quattro® available as a core Q5 family strength.

build_pages.name: Audi Q7
build_pages.hero_sub: Three-row luxury. Standard quattro®. Room for the whole crew.
build_pages.intro: The Audi Q7 sits at the intersection of luxury and versatility—with seven-passenger seating, generous cargo space, and the confidence of quattro® all-wheel drive.

features.label: Space
features.title: Larger than life luxury
features.body: With superior handling, an intuitive interface, and seating for seven, the Q7 is built for families who refuse to compromise.
bullets: Up to 68.1 cu-ft cargo volume (2nd/3rd rows folded)

features.label: Technology
features.title: Intuitive interface
features.body: A driver-focused digital experience keeps controls and information where they belong.

features.label: Capability
features.title: quattro® + everyday power
features.body: Standard quattro® all-wheel drive and composed SUV dynamics make the Q7 as capable as it is refined.

build_pages.name: Audi Q8
build_pages.hero_sub: Bold coupe-SUV design. Towing muscle. Flagship presence.
build_pages.intro: The Audi Q8 delivers athletic exterior design, premium technology, and serious capability—including up to 7,700 lbs towing capacity.

features.label: Design
features.title: Bold exterior design
features.body: Athletic lines, modern lighting, and a commanding Singleframe® grille define the Q8’s presence.

features.label: Capability
features.title: Built to move more
features.body: Rear-seat comfort and cargo capacity meet serious towing confidence.
bullets: Cargo volume up to 60.7 cu-ft (seats folded)

features.label: Technology
features.title: Virtual cockpit plus
features.body: A high-resolution digital cluster and dual-touch MMI® system put the driver in command.

build_pages.name: Audi A3
build_pages.hero_sub: Premium sedan essentials—compact footprint, full Audi character.
build_pages.intro: The Audi A3 sets the standard with premium features and functionality in a size built for real life—including standard panoramic sunroof, LED headlights, and quattro® all-wheel drive.

features.label: Design
features.title: Streamlined exterior
features.body: Iconic Audi body lines meet modern lighting and available Black optic and S line packages.

features.label: Interior
features.title: Driver-centric cabin
features.body: A modern dash and center console keep controls functional and focused on the driver.

features.label: Performance
features.title: quattro® standard
features.body: Everyday performance with the confidence of quattro® all-wheel drive.

build_pages.name: Audi A5
build_pages.hero_sub: Panoramic digital stage. quattro® standard. Next-gen A5.
build_pages.intro: The 2026 Audi A5 brings a panoramic digital cockpit, standard quattro®, and a 7-speed S tronic® transmission—luxury sedan presence with modern tech.

features.label: Technology
features.title: Your digital stage
features.body: The 11.9" virtual cockpit integrates seamlessly with the 14.5" MMI® display for a panoramic digital experience.

features.label: Design
features.title: Modern lighting + stance
features.body: LED headlights are standard, with available Matrix-design lighting and S sport suspension options.

features.label: Performance
features.title: quattro® + S tronic®
features.body: Standard quattro® all-wheel drive and a 7-speed S tronic® dual-clutch transmission deliver composed, confident driving.

build_pages.name: Audi A6
build_pages.hero_sub: Executive sedan comfort with progressive Audi technology.
build_pages.intro: The Audi A6 Sedan is the executive choice—refined ride, advanced digital interfaces, and the presence of a full-size luxury sedan.

features.label: Luxury
features.title: Executive presence
features.body: A refined cabin and polished road manners make the A6 the everyday flagship sedan for drivers who value composure.

features.label: Technology
features.title: Connected cockpit
features.body: Digital displays and connected services keep the drive informed and effortless.

features.label: Performance
features.title: Confident dynamics
features.body: Powerful, refined performance with the option to step up into RS 6 Avant territory for pure performance.
bullets: Sedan dynamics tuned for daily luxury
Explore RS 6 Avant for max performance

build_pages.name: Audi A8
build_pages.hero_sub: Flagship luxury. First-class cabin. Quiet authority.
build_pages.intro: The Audi A8 is the flagship sedan—crafted for executives who want presence, technology, and a first-class ride.

features.label: Flagship
features.title: First-class luxury
features.body: From materials to ride quality, the A8 is built to feel like a private suite on wheels.

features.label: Technology
features.title: Advanced digital suite
features.body: A full suite of digital and comfort technologies keep the cabin effortless.
bullets: Available massaging seats on upper trims

features.label: Performance
features.title: Effortless power
features.body: Smooth, confident power delivery with the option to step into S8 performance.

build_pages.name: Audi Q4 e-tron
build_pages.intro: The Audi Q4 e-tron® merges electric performance with mid-size SUV utility—placing luxury EV driving firmly within reach.

features.label: Electric
features.title: All-electric drive
features.body: Emissions-free everyday driving with the utility of a compact luxury SUV.
bullets: EPA-estimated range up to 288 miles (trim/config dependent)

features.label: Practical
features.title: Fitted for real life
features.body: Mid-size utility with a compact footprint and thoughtful packaging for passengers and cargo.

features.label: Shop
features.title: Available at Audi Baton Rouge
features.body: Explore Q4 e-tron® and Q4 Sportback e-tron® inventory locally.

build_pages.name: Audi Q4 Sportback e-tron
build_pages.hero_sub: Sleek electric Sportback silhouette. Premium EV presence.
build_pages.intro: The Q4 Sportback e-tron® pairs electric performance with a sleek Sportback profile for drivers who want style without giving up EV practicality.

features.label: Design
features.title: Sportback electric style
features.body: A sleeker silhouette and elegant interior mark the Sportback as the more expressive Q4 e-tron® choice.

features.label: Charging
features.title: Fast-charge ready
features.body: Public DC fast charging can take the battery from low to 80% in about 28 minutes (conditions apply).
bullets: About 28 min DC fast charge window

features.label: Experience
features.title: Luxury electric within reach
features.body: A premium cabin and modern tech keep the Q4 Sportback e-tron® as usable as it is distinctive.

build_pages.name: Audi Q6 e-tron
build_pages.hero_sub: Next-chapter electric SUV. Rapid charge. Modern presence.
build_pages.intro: The Audi Q6 e-tron® marks a new chapter in electromobility—balancing evolved aesthetics, high technology, and rapid charging capability.

features.label: Electric performance
features.title: Serious EV power
features.body: With launch-control performance on quattro models and rapid DC charging, the Q6 e-tron® is built for modern electric driving.
bullets: Up to 456 HP with launch control (Q6 e-tron quattro)
Up to 270 kW DC max charging

features.label: Design
features.title: Evolved aesthetics
features.body: A progressive exterior and modern cabin position the Q6 e-tron® as a next-gen Audi EV.
bullets: Available Sportback body style in family

features.label: Shop
features.title: Available at Audi Baton Rouge
features.body: Browse Q6 e-tron® inventory and experience the lineup in person.

build_pages.name: Audi S5
build_pages.hero_sub: S performance. Sharper stance. Everyday usability.
build_pages.intro: The Audi S5 elevates the A5 formula with S performance character—more athletic presence and a more engaging drive.

features.label: S Performance
features.title: Built for the drive
features.body: S badging means more than looks—expect a sportier attitude on the road while keeping daily luxury intact.

features.label: Design
features.title: S presence
features.body: Distinct S design elements set the S5 apart from the standard A5.

features.label: Shop
features.title: Shop S5 at ABR
features.body: Explore current S5 inventory and get pre-qualified online.

build_pages.name: Audi SQ5
build_pages.hero_sub: S performance SUV. Everyday utility. Elevated dynamics.
build_pages.intro: The Audi SQ5 takes the Q5 formula and turns up performance and presence—ideal for drivers who want S character in an SUV.

features.label: Performance
features.title: SQ5 dynamics
features.body: More athletic power delivery and S design cues without losing Q5 practicality.

features.label: Design
features.title: S presence
features.body: Distinctive SQ5 styling sets it apart from the standard Q5 lineup.
bullets: Available Sportback body style in family

features.label: Shop
features.title: Shop SQ5 locally
features.body: Browse Q5-family inventory at Audi Baton Rouge and ask about SQ5 availability.
